title: status-pipe ack inbox file
description: Operator → orchestrator signal at .status-pipe/inbox/<ticket>/ack-<ackId>.json. Created atomically by the extension; consumed (deleted) by the orchestrator after recording the ackId in the ticket's history[].

kind.description: Signal kind. Future signals (pause, abandon, priority-bump) ride the same pipe.

ackId.description: First 8 hex chars of sha256(ticket + waitingKind + waitingSince). Always exactly 8 — history notes and the chip state machine match the verbatim id.

target.description: Snapshot of the waitingOn being answered; the supersession guard. For blockers-only acks, waitingKind='blockers' and waitingSince=the ticket file's updatedAt at click time.

stateUpdatedAt.description: The ticket file's updatedAt at click time

note.description: Optional operator one-liner shown to the orchestrator
